heading: Special rules with respect to section 501(c)(3) organizations
label: 508 Special rules with respect to section 501(c)(3) organizations

children.heading: New organizations must notify Secretary that they are applying for recognition of section 501(c)(3) status
children.label: a New organizations must notify Secretary that they are applying for recognition of section 501(c)(3) status

children.text: unless it has given notice to the Secretary in such manner as the Secretary may by regulations prescribe, that it is applying for recognition of such status, or
for any period before the giving of such notice, if such notice is given after the time prescribed by the Secretary by regulations for giving notice under this subsection.

children.heading: Presumption that organizations are private foundations
children.label: b Presumption that organizations are private foundations
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (c), any organization (including an organization in existence on ) which is described in section 501(c)(3) and which does not notify the Secretary, at such time and in such manner as the Secretary may by regulations prescribe, that it is not a private foundation shall be presumed to be a private foundation.October 9, 1969

children.label: A
children.text: churches, their integrated auxiliaries, and conventions or associations of churches, or

children.label: B
children.text: any organization which is not a private foundation (as defined in section 509(a)) and the gross receipts of which in each taxable year are normally not more than $5,000.

children.label: A
children.text: educational organizations described in section 170(b)(1)(A)(ii), and

children.label: B
children.text: any other class of organizations with respect to which the Secretary determines that full compliance with the provisions of subsections (a) and (b) is not necessary to the efficient administration of the provisions of this title relating to private foundations.

children.heading: Disallowance of certain charitable, etc., deductions
children.label: d Disallowance of certain charitable, etc., deductions

children.heading: Gift or bequest to organizations subject to section 507(c) tax
children.label: 1 Gift or bequest to organizations subject to section 507(c) tax
A
children.text: by any person after notification is made under section 507(a), or

children.label: B
children.text: by a substantial contributor (as defined in section 507(d)(2)) in his taxable year which includes the first day on which action is taken by such organization which culminates in the imposition of tax under section 507(c) and any subsequent taxable year.

children.heading: Gift or bequest to taxable private foundation, section 4947 trust, etc.
children.label: 2 Gift or bequest to taxable private foundation, section 4947 trust, etc.
A
children.text: to a private foundation or a trust described in section 4947 in a taxable year for which it fails to meet the requirements of subsection (e) (determined without regard to subsection (e)(2)), or

children.label: B
children.text: to any organization in a period for which it is not treated as an organization described in section 501(c)(3) by reason of subsection (a).

children.heading: Exception
children.label: 3 Exception
children.text: Paragraph (1) shall not apply if the entire amount of the unpaid portion of the tax imposed by section 507(c) is abated by the Secretary under section 507(g).

children.label: A
children.text: to require its income for each taxable year to be distributed at such time and in such manner as not to subject the foundation to tax under section 4942, and

children.label: B
children.text: to prohibit the foundation from engaging in any act of self-dealing (as defined in section 4941(d)), from retaining any excess business holdings (as defined in section 4943(c)), from making any investments in such manner as to subject the foundation to tax under section 4944, and from making any taxable expenditures (as defined in section 4945(d)).

children.heading: Special rules for existing private foundations
children.label: 2 Special rules for existing private foundations
A
children.text: to any period after , during the pendency of any judicial proceeding begun before , by the private foundation which is necessary to reform, or to excuse such foundation from compliance with, its governing instrument or any other instrument in order to meet the requirements of paragraph (1), andDecember 31, 1971January 1, 1972

children.label: B
children.text: to any period after the termination of any judicial proceeding described in subparagraph (A) during which its governing instrument or any other instrument does not permit it to meet the requirements of paragraph (1).

children.heading: Additional provisions relating to sponsoring organizations
children.label: f Additional provisions relating to sponsoring organizations
children.text: A sponsoring organization (as defined in section 4966(d)(1)) shall give notice to the Secretary (in such manner as the Secretary may provide) whether such organization maintains or intends to maintain donor advised funds (as defined in section 4966(d)(2)) and the manner in which such organization plans to operate such funds.
